name: get_block
content:
The system shall support
single sign-on (SSO) via SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect for enterprise customers.

function.name: patch_block
function.arguments: {"id":"req-1","content":"The system shall support\nsingle sign-on (SSO) via SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect (OIDC-compliant) for enterprise customers."}

content: Done. I updated req-1 to specify that OpenID Connect support is OIDC-compliant. The SAML 2.0 mention is preserved.
